name: sphinx-rtd-eth-theme

metadata.name: sphinx-rtd-eth-theme
metadata.summary: Read the Docs theme for Sphinx

documentation:
# Read the Docs Sphinx Theme

```{image} https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/sphinx_rtd_theme.svg
:alt: Pypi Version
:target: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/sphinx_rtd_theme
```

```{image} https://travis-ci.org/readthedocs/sphinx_rtd_theme.svg?branch=master
:alt: Build Status
:target: https://travis-ci.org/readthedocs/sphinx_rtd_theme
```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/pypi/l/sphinx_rtd_theme.svg
:alt: License
:target: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/sphinx_rtd_theme/
```

```{image} https://readthedocs.org/projects/sphinx-rtd-theme/badge/?version=latest
:alt: Documentation Status
:target: http://sphinx-rtd-theme.readthedocs.io/en/latest/?badge=latest
```

This [Sphinx] theme was designed to provide a great reader experience for
documentation users on both desktop and mobile devices. This theme is used
primarily on [Read the Docs] but can work with any Sphinx project. You can find
a working demo of the theme in the [theme documentation]

## Installation

This theme is distributed on [PyPI] and can be installed with `pip`:

```console
$ pip install sphinx-rtd-theme
```

To use the theme in your Sphinx project, you will need to add the following to
your `conf.py` file:

```python
import sphinx_rtd_theme

extensions = [
    ...
    "sphinx_rtd_theme",
]

html_theme = "sphinx_rtd_theme"
```

For more information read the full documentation on [installing the theme]

## Configuration

This theme is highly customizable on both the page level and on a global level.
To see all the possible configuration options, read the documentation on
[configuring the theme].

## Contributing

If you would like to help modify or translate the theme, you'll find more
information on contributing in our [contributing guide].

[configuring the theme]: https://sphinx-rtd-theme.readthedocs.io/en/latest/configuring.html
[contributing guide]: https://sphinx-rtd-theme.readthedocs.io/en/latest/contributing.html
[installing the theme]: https://sphinx-rtd-theme.readthedocs.io/en/latest/installing.html
[pypi]: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/sphinx_rtd_theme
[read the docs]: http://www.readthedocs.org
[sphinx]: http://www.sphinx-doc.org
[theme documentation]: https://sphinx-rtd-theme.readthedocs.io/en/latest/
